description_long: This bed features an ornate, high headboard and a matching footboard, both adorned with intricate white scrollwork patterns on a brown, textured surface. The bedding consists of a dark, navy blue comforter with large, gold floral motifs, giving the bed a luxurious and classic appearance. Two plush, red pillows with gold patterns rest against the headboard, adding a touch of warmth and contrast. The bed frame appears solid and slightly flared at the base, suggesting stability and a traditional design. The overall look is elegant and regal, suitable for upscale urban interiors or boutique hotel settings. The materials and patterns evoke a sense of comfort and sophistication.
description: A luxurious bed with ornate brown headboard and footboard, navy and gold floral comforter, and red patterned pillows. The design is elegant and classic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate headboard, footboard, and both red pillows with the full bedding pattern visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the profile of the headboard, and the arrangement of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the detailed footboard scrollwork and the bed's flared base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the headboard, mattress, and pillows from the other direction.
